name: Generate Funny AI videos with Seedance 2.0 and auto-publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube with Blotato

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert AI video content strategist specializing in short-form video for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts, and in text-to-video prompt engineering for Seedance 2.0 by ByteDance.

Given the user video idea, produce ALL of the following:
1. video_prompt: an optimized prompt for Seedance 2.0. Cinematic and highly specific, under 200 characters. Describe subject, action, environment, lighting and mood. Use cinematic terms (slow pan, close-up, golden hour, soft bokeh, dramatic lighting). Avoid negative phrases.
2. tiktok_caption: trend-aware, engaging, MAX 3 hashtags.
3. instagram_caption: aesthetic, evocative, MAX 3 hashtags.
4. youtube_title: max 60 characters, SEO-friendly, no clickbait.
5. youtube_description: max 200 characters, includes 1-2 keywords.

Write captions in the same language as the user idea. Return only the structured JSON, nothing else.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "video_prompt": "Cinematic slow pan of a lone samurai walking through neon-lit Tokyo streets in the rain at night, soft bokeh, dramatic reflections, moody atmosphere",
  "tiktok_caption": "When the city never sleeps and neither do you 🌃 #neon #tokyo #ai",
  "instagram_caption": "Lost in the neon glow of a rainy Tokyo night ✨ #cinematic #moody #aiart",
  "youtube_title": "Neon Tokyo Rain - AI Cinematic Short",
  "youtube_description": "A cinematic AI-generated walk through neon Tokyo. Made with Seedance 2.0. #shorts #ai"
}

parameters.content:
# Generate Funny AI videos with Seedance 2.0 and auto-publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube with Blotato

# 📥  [Open full documentation on Notion](https://automatisation.notion.site/Generate-Funny-AI-videos-with-Seedance-2-0-and-auto-publish-to-TikTok-Instagram-and-YouTube-with-Bl-3883d6550fd98140b54bddf8df59ff88)

Send a funny video idea to your Telegram bot. An AI agent writes the optimized prompt and the captions, [AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE) generates the video with **Seedance 2.0 by ByteDance**, and [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) auto-publishes it to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube.

> ⚠️ Uses the [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) community node: requires n8n self-hosted or n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes enabled.

## How it works
1. Telegram trigger receives your video idea as a text message.
2. An AI agent (OpenAI) returns structured JSON: Seedance prompt + TikTok caption + Instagram caption + YouTube title + description (max 3 hashtags per caption).
3. The prompt is sent to the AtlasCloud Seedance 2.0 API; a 30s Wait → Get status → IF loop polls until the video is ready.
4. A Set node collects the video URL and all captions.
5. Three Blotato nodes publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube.
6. A Telegram confirmation is sent back to you.

## Setup
1. Telegram: create a bot with @BotFather, add the Bot Token as a Telegram credential on both Telegram nodes.
2. OpenAI: connect your OpenAI credential to the chat model.
3. AtlasCloud: create an account, generate an API key, make an HTTP Header Auth credential (Name: Authorization / Value: Bearer YOUR_KEY). After import, manually select it on the two AtlasCloud HTTP nodes.
4. Blotato: install the community node, connect your TikTok, Instagram and YouTube accounts, then pick the account in each Blotato node.

## Requirements
- n8n self-hosted or n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes
- Telegram Bot Token
- OpenAI API key
- AtlasCloud API key (Seedance 2.0 video generation, ≈ $0.10–0.15 / second of video)
- Blotato account with TikTok, Instagram and YouTube connected

## Customization
- Change duration (default 5s) in the Submit Video node body.
- Edit the agent system message to change language, tone or hashtag count.
- Add platforms by duplicating a Blotato node.

## 1-2. Idea → AI content
Telegram trigger + AI agent returning structured JSON (prompt + captions + YouTube title/description).

## 3. Video generation — AtlasCloud (Seedance 2.0)
Submit, then poll every 30s until ready.
⚠️ After import, manually select the AtlasCloud API credential on both HTTP nodes.

## 4. Publish — Blotato
Collect the video URL + captions, then publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube. Pick your account in each node.
